> high-install CI/docs reference; keep global-only to avoid bloating the curated sync surface.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add xixu-me/skills@github-actions-docs --skill github-actions-docs -y -g
```

**Use:** `/github-actions-docs`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-5 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/github-actions-docs.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run external-skill-auditor before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

High-install CI/docs reference skill. Marked global-only-or-avoid to prevent bloating the curated sync surface.

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add xixu-me/skills@github-actions-docs --skill github-actions-docs -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)
